query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, MAX(createdAt) as latest_created, MIN(createdAt) as earliest_created FROM biddings WHERE createdAt >= '2026-02-12 00:00:00' AND createdAt < '2026-02-13 00:00:00';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3uDLYjDbp6rUVuo.05399e1d7c2a --database NY6jPB2PH8byUzFWqjpfhf --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, MAX(createdAt) as latest_created, MIN(createdAt) as earliest_created FROM biddings WHERE createdAt >= '2026-02-12 00:00:00' AND createdAt < '2026-02-13 00:00:00';
